_comment: pantheon config. Copy to ~/.claude/pantheon/config.json (global) or <project>/.pantheon/config.json (per-project — wins). Only 'preset' is required; every other key overrides it. Presets: full | economy | quiet.
_routing: on = auto-fire the matched discipline · suggest = one-line nudge · off = manual
_announce: skills open with the one-block 🏛 announce (false saves tokens)
_recall: max past lessons auto-injected per prompt (0 = off, up to 3)
_gate: verification gate on Stop: block = refuse fake 'done' (failing tests / TODO stubs / unverified code) · warn = message only · off
_clarify: auto intent-clarifier: vague + large asks trigger 2-3 sharp questions before any work
_context_guard: context %% that triggers a checkpoint nudge before the window fills (0 = off)
_receipts: disciplines file one-line receipts; the dashboard renders them
_budget: USD caps read from the HUD spend ledger. mode: warn | ask | block. null = no cap
_custom_routes: your own regex -> skill routes; they win over built-ins
_packs: honor a committed pantheon.pack.json (team config + standards + shared lessons)
